rulings.Case Title: VERA TANIELIAN ET AL VS. MARK CUSING ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion To: 1) Compel The Deposition Of Julie Aviles, Pmq For Defendant Raymond R. Aviles, Dba Laurel Properties; 2) Reopen Discovery For Limited Purpose; And 3) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFFs VERA TANIELIAN and CHAHE TANIELIAN's Motion To: 1) Compel The Deposition Of Julie Aviles, Pmq For Defendant Raymond R. Aviles, Dba Laurel Properties; 2) Reopen Discovery For Limited Purpose; And 3) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions Hearing Required. Parties to appear at 8:30 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts. By no later than 8:30 a.m. Plaintiff is to file and serve a list of documents (identified by bates number and document title) accompanied by a description of the scope of questions as to each identified document to be addressed at a requested continued deposition in a table format. Courtesy copy to be delivered to department 501 no later than 9:00 a.m. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID SMITH VS. EDDIE YIM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANTs EDDIE YIM, CARRIE YIM and 1588 INDIANA CORPORATION's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID SMITH VS. EDDIE YIM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANTs EDDIE YIM, CARRIE YIM and 1588 INDIANA CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action. No opposition filed. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT O'CONNOR VS. CARRINGTON MORTGAGE SERVICES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2018 line 3. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: BANCAL MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. RICHARD CRESPO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Motion For Order Vacating Judgment And Recalling Writ Of Possession Based On Attorney Fault
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT RICHARD CRESPO's Motion For Order Vacating Judgment And Recalling Writ Of Possession Based On Attorney Fault GRANTED based on mandatory relief under CCP 473(b). January 26, 2018 judgment is vacated. The Court considered Defendant's argument in opposition to Plaintiff's ex-parte application for entry of judgment. Plaintiff's ex-parte application is granted: judgment for possession and $936.80 shall be entered against Defendant. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: VALSTOCK VETURES LLC VS. XIAN SITU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Teminating Sanctions Or Contempt, Etc.; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Annie Y. Pan In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2018 line 10. DEFENDANT XIAN SITU's MOTION For Teminating Sanctions Or Contempt, Etc. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part, subject to opposition. Motion for terminating sanctions is granted. Motion for Contempt is denied. Monetary sanctions are granted in the amount of $700. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN BALDINI VS. JAMES MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT JAMES MARTINEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: POSEE CHUNG VS. RICK QURESHI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2018 line 8. DEFENDANT RICK QURESHI's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint GRANTED. Plaintiff to attempt personal/substitute service at Defendant's last known address. If such attempts are not successful Plaintiff may apply for a Post and Mail order for Defendant to be served by posting at the premises and mailing by certified mail to the last known address of 520 Frederick Street, #12, San Francisco, CA 94117. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: WILLOW TREE INVESTMENTS, INC. VS. HAMZA BOUCHAFRA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2018 line 9. DEFENDANT HAMZA BOUCHAFRA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to March 5, 2018. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than February 28, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/GLW)
